replies.msg:
source:https://www.coronavirus.gov.hk/eng/anti-epidemic-fund-1.html
coz "First round of $30 billion Anti-epidemic Fund" is mainly focus on those industries which have ballots in the LEGCO election
Generally speaking, we thought giving this 30 billion directly to the citizens will be better to solve the social problem. Giving money ("subsidy") to those industries is kind of collusion between Government and the business sector as well as transfer of benefits.
The question is why these industry? Why not the others?
Our conclusion is Transfer of Benefits.

And the democratic parties always use "if we ban this bill, the interest of some parties will be harmed". So they always approve those bill which can benefit the "citizens". This is their excuse to approve/abstain every evil bill (actually every coin has two sides. The bill must benefit certain group of people.)
